files.content:
---
import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

type Props = HTMLAttributes<"button"> &
  HTMLAttributes<"a"> &
  HTMLAttributes<"div"> &
  HTMLAttributes<"span"> & {
    as?: "a" | "button" | "div" | "span"
    href?: string
  }

const { as: explicitTag, class: className, type, ...props } = Astro.props

const Tag = explicitTag || ("href" in Astro.props ? "a" : "button")
---

<Tag
  data-slot="tooltip-trigger"
  type={Tag === "button" ? type || "button" : undefined}
  class={cn(className)}
  {...props}
>
  <slot />
</Tag>

export { default as Tooltip } from "./tooltip.astro"
export { default as TooltipContent } from "./tooltip-content.astro"
export { default as TooltipTrigger } from "./tooltip-trigger.astro"
